name: Build an Agent
sequence: Create, edit, or rebuild an agent skill through conversational discovery.
command: {-H: headless mode}|{description: initial agent concept}|{path: existing agent to edit or rebuild}

name: Analyze an Agent
sequence: Run quality analysis on an existing agent — structure, cohesion, prompt craft, and enhancement opportunities.

name: Setup Builder Module
sequence: Install or update BMad Builder module config and help entries.
command: {-H: headless mode}|{inline values: skip prompts with provided values}

name: Ideate Module
sequence: Brainstorm and plan a BMad module — explore ideas, decide architecture, and produce a build plan.

name: Create Module
sequence: Scaffold module infrastructure into built skills, making them an installable BMad module.
command: {-H: headless mode}|{path: skills folder or single SKILL.md}

name: Validate Module
sequence: Check that a module's structure is complete, accurate, and all capabilities are properly registered.
command: {-H: headless mode}|{path: module or skill to validate}

name: Build a Workflow
sequence: Create, edit, or rebuild a workflow or utility skill.
command: {-H: headless mode}|{description: initial skill concept}|{path: existing skill to edit or rebuild}

name: Analyze a Workflow
sequence: Run quality analysis on an existing workflow/skill — structure, efficiency, and enhancement opportunities.

name: Convert a Skill
sequence: Convert any skill to BMad-compliant, outcome-driven equivalent with before/after HTML comparison report.
command: {--convert: path or URL to source skill}|{-H: headless mode}

name: Write Document
sequence: Describe in detail what you want, and the agent will follow documentation best practices. Multi-turn conversation with subprocess for research/review.

name: Update Standards
sequence: Update agent memory documentation-standards.md with your specific preferences if you discover missing document conventions.

name: Mermaid Generate
sequence: Create a Mermaid diagram based on user description. Will suggest diagram types if not specified.

name: Validate Document
sequence: Review the specified document against documentation standards and best practices. Returns specific actionable improvement suggestions organized by priority.

name: Explain Concept
sequence: Create clear technical explanations with examples and diagrams for complex concepts.

name: Brainstorm Project
sequence: Expert guided facilitation through a single or multiple techniques.

name: Check Implementation Readiness
sequence: Ensure PRD UX Architecture and Epics Stories are aligned.

name: Checkpoint
sequence: Guided walkthrough of a change from purpose and context into details. Use for human review of commits branches or PRs.

name: Code Review
sequence: Story cycle: If issues back to DS if approved then next CS or ER if epic complete.

name: Correct Course
sequence: Navigate significant changes. May recommend start over update PRD redo architecture sprint planning or correct epics and stories.

name: Create Architecture
sequence: Guided workflow to document technical decisions.

name: Create PRD
sequence: Expert led facilitation to produce your Product Requirements Document.

name: Create Story
sequence: Story cycle start: Prepare first found story in the sprint plan that is next or a specific epic/story designation.

name: Validate Story
sequence: Validates story readiness and completeness before development work begins.

name: Create UX
sequence: Guidance through realizing the plan for your UX, strongly recommended if a UI is a primary piece of the proposed project.

name: Dev Story
sequence: Story cycle: Execute story implementation tasks and tests then CR then back to DS if fixes needed.

name: Document Project
sequence: Analyze an existing project to produce useful documentation.

name: Domain Research
sequence: Industry domain deep dive subject matter expertise and terminology.

name: Generate Project Context
sequence: Scan existing codebase to generate a lean LLM-optimized project-context.md. Essential for brownfield projects.

name: Market Research
sequence: Market analysis competitive landscape customer needs and trends.

name: PRFAQ Challenge
sequence: Working Backwards guided experience to forge and stress-test your product concept to ensure you have a great product that users will love and need through the PRFAQ gauntlet to determine feasibility and alignment with user needs. alternative to product brief.

name: Create Brief
sequence: An expert guided experience to nail down your product idea in a brief. a gentler approach than PRFAQ when you are already sure of your concept and nothing will sway you.

name: QA Automation Test
sequence: Generate automated API and E2E tests for implemented code. NOT for code review or story validation — use CR for that.

name: Quick Dev
sequence: Unified intent-in code-out workflow: clarify plan implement review and present.

name: Retrospective
sequence: Optional at epic end: Review completed work lessons learned and next epic or if major issues consider CC.

name: Sprint Planning
sequence: Kicks off implementation by producing a plan the implementation agents will follow in sequence for every story.

name: Sprint Status
sequence: Anytime: Summarize sprint status and route to next workflow.

name: Technical Research
sequence: Technical feasibility architecture options and implementation approaches.

name: Brainstorming
sequence: Use early in ideation or when stuck generating ideas.

name: BMad Customize
sequence: Use when you want to change how an agent or workflow behaves — add persistent facts, swap templates, insert activation hooks, or customize menus. Scans what's customizable, picks the right scope (agent vs workflow), writes the override to _bmad/custom/, and verifies the merge. No TOML hand-authoring required.

name: Distillator
sequence: Use when you need token-efficient distillates that preserve all information for downstream LLM consumption.
description: adjacent to source document or specified output_path

name: Editorial Review - Prose
sequence: Use after drafting to polish written content.
output-location: three-column markdown table with suggested fixes

name: Editorial Review - Structure
sequence: Use when doc produced from multiple subprocesses or needs structural improvement.

name: Index Docs
sequence: Use when LLM needs to understand available docs without loading everything.

name: Party Mode
sequence: Orchestrate multi-agent discussions when you need multiple perspectives or want agents to collaborate.

name: Adversarial Review
sequence: Use for quality assurance or before finalizing deliverables. Code Review in other modules runs this automatically, but also useful for document reviews.

name: Edge Case Hunter Review
sequence: Use alongside adversarial review for orthogonal coverage — method-driven not attitude-driven.

name: Shard Document
sequence: Use when doc becomes too large (>500 lines) to manage effectively.

name: Brainstorming
sequence: Facilitate brainstorming sessions using one or more techniques.

name: Design Thinking
sequence: Guide human-centered design processes using empathy-driven methodologies.

name: Innovation Strategy
sequence: Identify disruption opportunities and architect business model innovation.

name: Problem Solving
sequence: Apply systematic problem-solving methodologies to crack complex challenges.

name: Storytelling
sequence: Craft compelling narratives using proven story frameworks and techniques.

name: Brainstorm Game
sequence: Facilitate game brainstorming sessions with game-specific context and techniques.

name: Check Implementation Readiness
sequence: Ensure GDD UX Architecture and Epics Stories are aligned before production begins.

name: Code Review
sequence: Perform thorough clean context QA code review on stories flagged Ready for Review.

name: Correct Course
sequence: Navigate significant changes during game dev sprint when implementation is off-track.

name: Create Epics and Stories
sequence: Create the Epics and Stories listing from GDD requirements. These are the specs that drive development.

name: Game Brief
sequence: Interactive game brief creation that guides users through defining their game vision.

name: Game Design Document
sequence: Create a GDD with mechanics systems progression and implementation guidance.

name: Narrative Design
sequence: Create comprehensive narrative documentation including story structure character arcs and world-building. Use for story-driven games.

name: Create PRD
sequence: Create a PRD from GDD or from scratch for use with external tools like bmad-assist.

name: Create Story
sequence: Create Story with comprehensive context for developer agent implementation.

name: Create UX Design
sequence: Guidance through realizing the plan for your game UX/UI, strongly recommended if UI is a primary piece of the proposed game.

name: Dev Story
sequence: Execute Dev Story workflow implementing tasks and tests.

name: Document Project
sequence: Analyze an existing game project to produce useful documentation.

name: Domain Research
sequence: Game industry domain deep dive subject matter expertise and terminology.

name: E2E Scaffold
sequence: Scaffold E2E testing infrastructure.

name: Edit GDD
sequence: Improve and enhance an existing GDD. Delegates to gds-edit-prd until GDD-specific edit flow is authored.

name: Edit PRD
sequence: Improve and enhance an existing PRD.

name: Game Architecture
sequence: Produce a scale-adaptive game architecture with engine systems networking and technical design.

name: Project Context
sequence: Create optimized project-context.md for chosen agentic tool consistency.

name: Market Research
sequence: Game market analysis competitive landscape player needs and trends.

name: Performance Test
sequence: Design performance testing strategy.

name: Playtest Plan
sequence: Create structured playtesting plan.

name: Quick Dev
sequence: Clarify plan implement review and present any user intent or change request in a single workflow.

name: Quick Prototype
sequence: Rapid game prototyping to test mechanics and ideas quickly.

name: Retrospective
sequence: Facilitate team retrospective after a game development epic is completed.

name: Sprint Planning
sequence: Generate or update sprint-status.yaml from epic files.

name: Sprint Status
sequence: View sprint progress surface risks and get next action recommendation.

name: Technical Research
sequence: Technical feasibility game engine options and implementation approaches.

name: Test Automate
sequence: Generate automated game tests.

name: Test Design
sequence: Create comprehensive game test scenarios covering gameplay progression and quality requirements.

name: Test Framework
sequence: Initialize game test framework architecture for Unity Unreal Engine or Godot projects.

name: Test Review
sequence: Review test quality and coverage.

name: Validate GDD
sequence: Validate an existing GDD against standards. Delegates to gds-validate-prd until GDD-specific checks are authored.

name: Validate PRD
sequence: Validate PRD against standards for external tool compatibility.

name: Create Song
sequence: Create a complete Suno-ready song package with style prompt + lyrics + parameters through guided creative conversation.

name: Refine Song
sequence: Post-generation refinement: translate feedback into concrete Suno parameter adjustments.

name: Browse Songbook
sequence: Browse past songs and successful prompts from your creative history.

name: Save Memory
sequence: Save current session context to Mac's memory for next time.

name: Manage Bands
sequence: Create, edit, list, duplicate, or delete band identity profiles with genre, vocal direction, and writer voice.

name: Analyze Writer Voice
sequence: Extract writing voice patterns from samples and store in a band profile.

name: Profile Health Check
sequence: Assess profile completeness and quality beyond structural validation.

name: Feedback Loop
sequence: Guided post-generation feedback loop that translates subjective reactions into concrete parameter adjustments.

name: Transform Lyrics
sequence: Transform poems and text into Suno-ready structured lyrics with metatags and cliche detection.

name: Analyze Lyrics
sequence: Analyze raw text for song structure potential without transforming — returns structure analysis, syllable patterns, and character budget.

name: Setup Suno Module
sequence: Install or update Suno Band Manager module config and help entries.
command: {-H: headless mode}|{inline values: skip prompts with provided values}

name: Build Style Prompt
sequence: Generate model-aware Suno style prompts with creativity modes, wild card variants, and exclusion prompts optimized for your chosen model tier.

name: Teach Me Testing
sequence: Teach testing fundamentals through 7 sessions (TEA Academy).

name: ATDD
sequence: Generate red-phase acceptance test scaffolds before implementation.

name: Test Automation
sequence: Expand test coverage.

name: CI Setup
sequence: Configure CI/CD quality pipeline.

name: Test Framework
sequence: Initialize production-ready test framework.

name: NFR Assessment
sequence: Non-functional requirements assessment.

name: Test Design
sequence: Risk-based test planning.

name: Test Review
sequence: Quality audit (0-100 scoring).

name: Traceability
sequence: Coverage traceability and gate.

name: Agentic Development
sequence: Iterative build-verify cycle with design log tracking and browser verification.

name: Alignment & Signoff
sequence: Stakeholder buy-in pitch and service agreement. Skip if building your own product.

name: Conceptual Sketching
sequence: Fast rough visual exploration before detailed specification. Skip for straightforward scenarios.

name: Conceptual Specifications
sequence: Document every design decision for every element on every page. Developers build directly from this.

name: Design Delivery
sequence: Validate specs are complete and package as DD yaml files for development handoff.

name: Design System
sequence: Manage component library and design tokens. Skip if Design System Mode None.

name: Wake Freya
sequence: UX Designer agent for Phases 3-4. Checks prerequisites and offers next steps.

name: Functional Components
sequence: Extract reusable patterns from specs into component definitions. Skip if Design System Mode None.

name: Wake Idun
sequence: Setup and governance agent. Interviews org to configure Agent Space and authority model.

name: Outline Scenarios
sequence: Define user journeys as persona+goal+outcome. Each connects to a Trigger Map driving force.

name: Platform Requirements
sequence: Technical boundaries: platforms devices integrations constraints. Skip for simple landing pages.

name: Product Evolution
sequence: Continuous improvement: feedback to Trigger Map to spec update to code to verify.

name: Project Brief
sequence: Define product vision positioning and success criteria. Every design decision traces back to this.

name: Wake Saga
sequence: Strategic Analyst agent for Phases 1-2. Scans repos and offers next steps.

name: Storyboarding
sequence: Sequence the user journey through screens with entry points transitions and error paths. Skip for simple scenarios.

name: Trigger Mapping
sequence: Map business goals to user psychology. Create personas and score features against driving forces.

name: Acceptance Testing
sequence: Test on real users in their environment with retrospective think-aloud sessions.

name: Visual Design
sequence: Transform specs into styled HTML prototypes with Figma round-trips.
